prevalence.source: European hematology and nutrition epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Macrocytosis with low B12/folate and supportive biomarkers; workup for pernicious anemia; neurologic assessment

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; detected via CBC and targeted testing
publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: hundreds of thousands to a few million

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Broad access to B12/folate and autoimmune testing in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: B12 replacement and folate supplementation; address underlying malabsorption and medication contributors
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Ensuring follow-up in older adults and post-bariatric patients
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: High diagnostic access and effective low-cost treatment
